about.description: Engineer turned product thinker. I've shipped mobile apps, built government-scale systems, advised CEOs, enabled a funding round, and scaled operations 3×. I work across UX, AI, cloud, mobile, security, and games. I don't just build features — I own outcomes.

professionalJourney.title: Product Manager & Tech Advisor to CEO
professionalJourney.description: Proposed and led development of the company's first owned product — a strategic pivot from services to product-led. The product successfully launched and enabled the company to raise funding. Led projects of national importance (Tourism Dept. MP Govt., NABARD), launching 3 new digital products from concept through deployment. Developed software solutions that scaled offline operations 3×. Advised the CEO on technology stack, AI, automation, vendor selection, and digital transformation strategy.

professionalJourney.title: Product & Engineering Lead
professionalJourney.description: Led cross-functional teams through end-to-end product development and delivery, setting timelines, unblocking engineers, and ensuring quality at launch. Delivered a fully production-ready app in under 2 months — from zero to Play Store. Served as Advisor to the CEO, translating business goals into product strategy and providing technical guidance on architecture and platform choices.

professionalJourney.title: Product & Engineering Intern
professionalJourney.description: Led the product end-to-end from initial design and architecture through production launch, owning every phase of the development lifecycle. Scaled the product to iOS, expanding the addressable user base. Drove a 40% reduction in development time by streamlining engineering workflows and introducing reusable component libraries.

education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science
education.institute: Pimpri Chinchwad College of Engineering, Pune
education.description: B.E. in Computer Science with focus on Software Engineering, Mobile Development, and Systems Design. Final year student building at the intersection of product, engineering, and AI.

projects.name: DivyaDarshan360
projects.description: 360° VR spiritual streaming app for elderly users. Features live temple rituals, aartis, and heritage experiences from sacred sites across India.

projects.name: Zylience fit
projects.description: Personal AI wellness coach ingesting real-time wearable data (heart rate, SpO2, sleep) to deliver personalized health guidance. HIPAA-compliant AI ensures clinical-grade data privacy.

projects.name: MP Tourism TFC System
projects.description: Digital ticketing system for MP Tourism Facilitation Centres. Replaced manual bottlenecks and directly enabled 3× scale of TFC centre operations across Madhya Pradesh.

projects.name: NABARD WMS Advisory
projects.description: Advised on modernising a Warehouse Management System for NABARD. Proposed AI roadmap spanning quality assurance, demand forecasting, inventory optimisation, and IoT-based real-time tracking.

projects.name: DigiPanchatyat
projects.description: A digital governance app that brings gram panchayat services online — enabling citizens to access government schemes, file complaints, and track local development work.

projects.name: And many more...
projects.description: A collection of earlier projects including NoteIt, VisionaryAI, and SkyForecast demonstrating a solid foundation in mobile development and AI integration.
